mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, MENU_ID, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, UPTIMESTAMP_USER, UPTIMESTAMP_TIME FROM (SELECT A.USER_ID, A.MENU_ID, A.CREATE_USER, A.CREATE_TIME, A.UPTIMESTAMP_USER, A.UPTIMESTAMP_TIME, B.DISPORDER FROM TB_MED_GOV_MENU A, TB_MED_MENU B WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID UNION SELECT DISTINCT null , B.PARENT_MENU_ID , null , null , null , null , null FROM TB_MED_MENU B , TB_MED_GOV_MENU C WHERE B.MENU_ID = C.MENU_ID AND C.USER_ID = #{userId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT null , F.PARENT_MENU_ID , null , null , null , null , null FROM TB_MED_GOV_MENU D , TB_MED_MENU E , TB_MED_MENU F WHERE F.MENU_ID = E.PARENT_MENU_ID AND F.PARENT_MENU_ID is not null AND E.MENU_ID = D.MENU_ID AND D.USER_ID = #{userId} ) ORDER BY DISPORDER
